zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Alden於1592年1月14日出生在英國艾可波金時，她的父親George Joseph Alden18歲，母親Jane Fowke16歲。她於大約1610年與Edmund Chandler在英國英格蘭倫敦斯托克 聶文頓結婚。她去世於1638年3月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Alden于1592年1月14日出生在英国艾可波金时，她的父亲George Joseph Alden18岁，母亲Jane Fowke16岁。她于大约1610年与Edmund Chandler在英国英格兰倫敦斯托克 聶文頓结婚。她去世于1638年3月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Alden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alan  , in Britain generally found only as a surname, but in North America equally common as a given name.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Alden was born on 14 January 1592, in Bocking, Essex, England, her father, George Joseph Alden, was 18 and her mother, Jane Fowke, was 16. She married Edmund Chandler about 1610, in Stoke Newington, London, England, United Kingdom. She died on 15 March 1638, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 46.

Elle a épousé Edmund Chandler environ 1610, à Stoke Newington, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Aldenが1592年1月14日にイギリスエセックスボクイングで生まれた時，父George Joseph Aldenは18歳，母Jane Fowkeは16歳であった。約1610年にイギリスイギリスロンドンストク ニューイントンでEdmund Chandlerと結婚した。彼女は1638年3月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alden(이)가 1592년 1월 14일 영국 에세스 보킨그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Joseph Alden(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Fowke(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1610년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스토크 뉴잉턴에서 Edmund Chandler(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1638년 3월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Alden nasceu em 14 de janeiro de 1592, em Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Joseph Alden, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Jane Fowke, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Chandler aproximadamente 1610, em Stoke Newington, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 15 de março de 1638, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Alden родилась 14 января 1592 г. в местности боккинг, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени George Joseph Alden было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Fowke, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Chandler около 1610 г. в местности сток нюингтон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 15 марта 1638 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Alden nació el 14 de enero de 1592, en Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, George Joseph Alden, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Jane Fowke, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Edmund Chandler aproximadamente 1610, en Stoke Newington, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1638, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 46 años.
